prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the visual style and layout concepts from image 2. Change the header color scheme to match image 2's orange/yellow. Modify the item details section to include space for a product image and detailed listing structure.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1 by integrating the modern visual style, color palette, and layout concepts from image 2. Specifically:
1.  **Header:** Update the top header section of image 1 to match the warm orange color scheme and clean typography of image 2's header.
2.  **Item Details:** Redesign the 'Description' table in image 1 into a detailed product listing structure, mirroring image 2's "PRODUCT" section. This new section should prominently feature:
    *   Space for a product image positioned on the left.
    *   Product name and specific attributes (e.g., model, color) textually detailed to the right of the image.
    *   Below the product details, include separate line items for services, discounts, subtotal, tax, and total amounts, adopting the distinct, spaced-out presentation style of image 2.
objects: Space for a product image on the left within the product listing
Product name text to the right of the product image
Product attributes text (e.g., model, color) to the right of the product image
Separate line items for services and discounts
